name: Unit Converter
description: Converts values between common engineering units
author: NISystem

output_name.description: Custom output name (leave blank for auto)

code:
# Unit Converter
# Common engineering unit conversions

input_tag = config.get('input_tag', 'Temperature_1')
conversion = config.get('conversion', 'C_to_F')
output_name = config.get('output_name', '')

value = tags.get(input_tag, 0)

# Conversion functions
conversions = {
    'C_to_F': lambda x: x * 9/5 + 32,
    'F_to_C': lambda x: (x - 32) * 5/9,
    'PSI_to_bar': lambda x: x * 0.0689476,
    'bar_to_PSI': lambda x: x * 14.5038,
    'PSI_to_kPa': lambda x: x * 6.89476,
    'kPa_to_PSI': lambda x: x * 0.145038,
    'GPM_to_LPM': lambda x: x * 3.78541,
    'LPM_to_GPM': lambda x: x * 0.264172,
    'in_to_mm': lambda x: x * 25.4,
    'mm_to_in': lambda x: x / 25.4,
    'lb_to_kg': lambda x: x * 0.453592,
    'kg_to_lb': lambda x: x * 2.20462,
    'HP_to_kW': lambda x: x * 0.7457,
    'kW_to_HP': lambda x: x * 1.341
}

# Unit suffixes for auto-naming
unit_suffixes = {
    'C_to_F': '_F',
    'F_to_C': '_C',
    'PSI_to_bar': '_bar',
    'bar_to_PSI': '_PSI',
    'PSI_to_kPa': '_kPa',
    'kPa_to_PSI': '_PSI',
    'GPM_to_LPM': '_LPM',
    'LPM_to_GPM': '_GPM',
    'in_to_mm': '_mm',
    'mm_to_in': '_in',
    'lb_to_kg': '_kg',
    'kg_to_lb': '_lb',
    'HP_to_kW': '_kW',
    'kW_to_HP': '_HP'
}

# Convert
if conversion in conversions:
    result = conversions[conversion](value)
else:
    result = value

# Determine output tag name
if output_name:
    tag_name = f'py.{output_name}'
else:
    suffix = unit_suffixes.get(conversion, '_Converted')
    tag_name = f'py.{input_tag}{suffix}'

publish(tag_name, result)
